name: Solmare
description: A white-walled city cascading down cliffs to the sea. Terraced gardens. Libraries built into the rock face. The harbor is the largest on the coast — every trade route touches Solmare eventually. The court sits at the highest terrace, looking down on everything. The view is the point.
atmosphere: Salt air, warm stone, distant music from the lower terraces, the snap of trade-ship sails, sunlight on white walls so bright it hurts
